[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands on a paved walkway outdoors, facing downward toward a pair of shoes placed near their feet, with a grassy park and distant buildings in the background.

Main Subject:
A person is centered in the foreground, standing with their head tilted slightly downward. They wear a black baseball cap, a light-colored face mask covering their lower face, a white long-sleeve shirt with a large circular graphic on the chest, black-and-white patterned shorts, white socks, and black patterned shoes with blue accents. They also wear a necklace that hangs down in front. Draped over their sides are two dark items: one appears on the left side hanging from their waist area and another on the right side.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors in a park-like area with a green lawn on both sides of the paved path. In the distance, there is a line of tall, pale buildings. The sky is hazy with soft daylight, and the lighting suggests late afternoon or early evening. The paved path has yellow curb-like barriers near the lower edge of the frame, and a long straight walkway stretches away into the distance.

Visual Details:
The image is taken from a low, slightly rear-facing angle, with the person occupying the middle lower portion of the frame. A yellow-and-black railing runs horizontally across the mid-foreground. On the ground near the person’s feet is a small bag or container with red and white fabric and a red object on top. Several clothing items are visible draped over the railing behind and to the right of the person, including a black garment. The overall color palette is muted greens and grays, contrasted by the bright white shirt and red details on the ground.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The photo shows a person standing on a paved outdoor path in a park, wearing a white graphic long-sleeve shirt and patterned shorts with face covering and cap. Shoes and clothing are visible on the ground and near the railing, while distant buildings and greenery fill the background.

# Notes

- The image contains multiple shirt/patch/print texts, but only **“LMG”**, **“SNS-B”**, and **“CALL”** are clearly readable. Other text is too small/blurred or obscured, so it’s marked **[unclear]**.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands in the center of the frame, posing outdoors against a backdrop of hazy, sunlit buildings and greenery. They are wearing a white long-sleeved t-shirt with a large black oval logo containing the letters "LVP" in white. The t-shirt also has black text printed vertically on the right sleeve. On their head, they wear a black baseball cap with pink lettering that appears to read "CAT MAYA." Their shorts are black with a bold, abstract white and black camouflage pattern, also featuring the "LVP" logo prominently. They are wearing white socks and black sneakers with blue accents.

Hanging on a yellow and black striped barrier in front of them are two sweatshirts. The one on the left is brown with red lettering that says "SNS-B CALLE." The one on the right is black with white lettering that appears to say "SNS-B CALLE" and some stylized graphics on the sleeve. To the left of the sweatshirts, on the ground, is a black duffel bag with a red strap and a white and red pattern.

The lighting suggests it's late afternoon or early morning, with a soft, diffused sunlight creating a warm, hazy glow. The sky is a pale orange and white, with some clouds. The background features a grassy area, a paved surface that looks like a runway or road, and distant apartment buildings. The overall mood is casual and streetwear-focused, with a slightly urban, candid feel. The color palette is dominated by black, white, and brown, with pops of red and blue.
